title: idhu varai illadha Lyrics goa song lyrics
stanzas:
idhu varai illadha unarvidhu
idhayathil undana kanavidhup
palithidum annalai thedidum padal kettaayo

moodamal moodi maraithadhu
thaanaga poothu varughudhu
thedamal thedi kidaithadhu ingey

inge oru inbam vandhu niraya
eppodhu en unmai nilai ariya
thaangamalum thoongamalum
naal selludhey

illamale nitham varum kanavu
kollamal kolla
sugam ennendru solla
nee thunai varavendum
neenda vazhi en payanam ohho ....

Ange angey vandhu vandhu kalakkum
venmegamum vennilavum pola
endhan mana ennangalai yaar arivar
en nenjamo un pola alla
yedho ore maatram
nilai puriyadha thottram

idhu nirandharam alla
maarividum mananilai dhan Ohhh ohh

manadhile ullorum unarvugal
malarnthadhey muthaana uravugal
thiranthadhe thannale kadhavugal
namakku munnale
manadhile ullorum unarvugal .....

dhegam ippodhu unarndhadhu
thendral en meedhu padarndhadhu
mogam munneri varugudhu munne
dhegam ippodhu unarndhadhu ....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'idhu varai illadha'?

The song conveys feelings of longing and unfulfilled love, reflecting the emotional struggles of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Goa'?

'Goa' revolves around the adventures and misadventures of a group of friends who travel to Goa, exploring themes of love and friendship.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah, known for her powerful and emotive vocal delivery.

Who composed the music for 'idhu varai illadha'?

The music for the song was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, a prominent figure in Tamil film music.

When was 'idhu varai illadha' released?

The song was released on February 27, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Goa, the song idhu varai illadha serves as a poignant reflection of unfulfilled desires and emotional turmoil. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, beautifully articulate the struggles of love and longing, evoking a sense of nostalgia. Andrea Jeremiah's soulful rendition, paired with Yuvan's captivating composition, creates an atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song encapsulates the essence of romance and melancholy, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: idhu varai illadha from Goa is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love. Andrea Jeremiah's soulful voice combined with Yuvan's enchanting music creates a captivating vibe that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is a perfect blend of emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for any Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: Until now, the feelings in your heart have been dreams that fade away when you wake up, have you heard the song?
It is hidden without any mood, it is coming like a flower, it is found without any search here.
It is hidden without any mood...
Here, happiness has come in plenty, always without knowing your true state, it keeps telling the days without sleep.
Without a home, the dream that comes every day cannot be caught, you must be the support to say that happiness is what I seek on this long journey.
There, there, it comes and creates chaos, like the bright clouds and the moonlight, who knows my thoughts, not like you, it is a strange state that cannot be understood.
This is not permanent, it will change, ohhh ohh.
In the heart, the feelings bloom, the true relationships open up, the doors are in front of us, in the heart, the feelings...
The body now feels the breeze falling on me, the fragrance is coming forward, the body now feels...
